name: extraction-trigger
_phase_2_5_note: Auto-Graphiti extraction trigger. Runs every 30 minutes; calls the Railway perception_worker /extraction-tick endpoint, which invokes scripts.extraction.batch_ingest.run_batch() — extracts entities + relationships into Neo4j hie_research subgraph for any paper_chunks rows where graphiti_uuid IS NULL. Concurrency is critical (OR-1): Graphiti's add_episode is NOT process-safe; queue mode + n8n per-workflow concurrency=1 must be enforced.

nodes.name: Run extraction-tick
nodes._comment: POST to perception_worker /extraction-tick. force=false respects kv_state guard; limit=null processes everything pending. method:POST is explicit — older n8n defaulted to GET when method was omitted, producing 404 not_found.
